arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen reeling after loss to Bayern Munich in Champions League
arts.sum: Mostly everyone thought Bayern mUnich and Bayer Leverkusen would be a battle in the Champions League on Wednesday. You can say we’ll need a miracle for the second leg,” said former Bayern Munich midfielder and current Bayer Leverkusen coach Xabi Alonso (as captured by FCBayern.com ).

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso finally loses to Bayern Munich in seventh head-to-head
arts.sum: It wasn’t the first time Leverkusen have suffered against Bayern under Alonso — even that Pokal victory was not easy sledding despite the man advantage — but it was the first time Die Werkself looked so thoroughly outworked and out of ideas. Looking for more thoughts and analysis on Bayern Munich’s massive and dominant 3-0 victory over Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League?

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Werder Bremen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Bayer Leverkusen and Werder Bremen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Tah reflects on Leverkusen's dismal night in Bavaria
arts.sum: Die Werkself's skipper laid bare the error of their ways in last night's crushing loss at the Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: 5 takeaways from Bayern Munich's's first-leg win over Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League last 16
arts.sum: Bayern Munich goal machine Harry Kane may have been experiencing what some called a drought heading into the clash with Leverkusen - he hadn't struck in four matches in all competitions (three in the Bundesliga and one in the Champions League) - but the England captain proved that he has lost nothing of his almost preternatural goal-scoring instincts. This season has seen champions Bayer Leverkusen engaged in a fascinating duel with record champions Bayern Munich, with the latest instalment the 3-0 home win for the Bavarians in the Champions League Last 16 first leg on Wednesday.
